<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2025  06:00</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">RT @MTGState legislators and the GA GOP got involved and changed our laws to protect elections in Georgia.They did a great job and it’s why President Trump won GA in 2024.But I think we can go even further by implementing paper ballots and one day elections.</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113813856967514972" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113813856967514972" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2025  06:14</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">Deranged Jack Smith was fired today by the DOJ. He is a disgrace to himself, his family, and his Country. After spending over $100,000,000 on the Witch Hunt against TRUMP, he left town empty handed!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113813910239950299" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113813910239950299" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2025  06:24</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">The fires are still raging in L.A. The incompetent pols have no idea how to put them out. Thousands of magnificent houses are gone, and many more will soon be lost. There is death all over the place. This is one of the worst catastrophes in the history of our Country. They just can’t put out the fires. What’s wrong with them?</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113813952733064849" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113813952733064849" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2025  12:43</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">The Stench of Deranged Jack Smith and his thugs is GONE. They were sent packing after spending over $100,000,000, destroying the lives of many people and families, who will never be the same again. Deranged  Jack accomplished nothing, except to show what complete losers my political opponents are!!!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div>

  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2025  20:30</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">Why would Deranged Jack Smith be allowed to issue a “report” on a complete and total Witch Hunt against me, strictly for political purposes, when he was thrown off the case and ultimately dismissed by the DOJ. Therefore, to put it nicely, he was illegitimately involved in this political persecution, and all of the hundreds of millions of dollars spent by our hapless government were,  simply put, wasted!  He has already filled thousands of rejected statements and documents against me, which were a “joke,” and the public just voted for me, in a landslide, to be their President!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>

  </div>

  <div class="text">To Gavin Newscum: RELEASE THE WATER FROM UP NORTH. MILLIONS OF GALLONS A DAY. WHAT’S TAKING YOU SO LONG. SHOULD HAVE DONE IT EIGHT YEARS AGO, AND YOU WOULD HAVE HAD NO FIRE PROBLEMS TODAY. GROSS INCOMPETENCE!</div>

  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2025  06:24</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">How bad is Seth Meyers on NBC, a “network” run by a truly bad group of people - Remember, they also run MSDNC. I got stuck watching Marble Mouth Meyers the other night, the first time in months, and every time I watch this moron I feel an obligation to say how dumb and untalented he is, merely a slot filler for the Scum that runs Comcast. These guys should be paying a lot of money for the right to give these “in kind” contributions to the Radical Left Democrat Party. These are not shows or entertainment, they are simply political hits, 100% of the time, to me and the Republican Party. Comcast should pay a BIG price for this!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113825273712457498" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113825273712457498" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2025  06:41</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">Deranged Jack Smith was unable to successfully prosecute the Political Opponent of his “boss,” Crooked Joe Biden, so he ends up writing yet another “Report” based on information that the Unselect Committee of Political Hacks  and Thugs ILLEGALLY DESTROYED AND DELETED, because it showed how totally innocent I was, and how completely guilty Nancy Pelosi, and others, were. Jack is a lamebrain prosecutor who was unable to get his case tried before the Election, which I won in a landslide. THE VOTERS HAVE SPOKEN!!!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113825342650202525" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113825342650202525" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2025  06:52</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">To show you how desperate Deranged Jack Smith is, he released his Fake findings at 1:00 A.M. in the morning. Did he say that the Unselect Committee illegally destroyed and deleted all of the evidence.</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2025  12:17</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">Pete Hegseth will make a GREAT Secretary of Defense. He has my Complete and Total support. Good luck today, Pete!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113826664007613749" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113826664007613749" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2025  12:23</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">RELEASE THE WATER, NEWSOM. WHAT IS WRONG WITH YOU? DJT</div>
  
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113826686962325672" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113826686962325672" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #997A2E" data-theme="trade" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2025  16:28</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">For far too long, we have relied on taxing our Great People using the Internal Revenue Service (IRS). Through soft and pathetically weak Trade agreements, the American Economy has delivered growth and prosperity to the World, while taxing ourselves. It is time for that to change. I am today announcing that I will create the EXTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE to collect our Tariffs, Duties, and all Revenue that come from Foreign sources. We will begin charging those that make money off of us with Trade, and they will start paying, FINALLY, their fair share. January 20, 2025, will be the birth date of the External Revenue Service. MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113827650534234057" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2025  16:46</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">Thank you Ron, hopefully other Governors will follow!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2025  20:35</span>

  </div>
  <div class="text"></div>
  
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2025  04:39</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">I am pleased to announce that Keith Sonderling will serve as the next United States Deputy Secretary of Labor. Keith will work with our great Nominee for Secretary of Labor, Lori Chavez-Deremer, to put our Country and Workers FIRST. Keith previously served as the Vice-Chairman of the Equal Employment Opportunity Commission, and the Acting Administrator of the Wage and Hour Division of the Department of Labor during my First Term. Keith graduated Magna Cum Laude from the University of Florida, and the Shepard School of Law at Nova Southeastern University. Congratulations Keith!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113830524777312896" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113830524777312896" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2025  16:03</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">Windmills are an economic and environmental disaster. I don’t want even one built during my Administration. The thousands of dead and broken ones should be ripped down ASAP. Most expensive energy, only work with massive government subsidies, which we will no longer pay!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113833216412524131" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113833216412524131" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2025  16:26</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text"></div>
  
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113833306008604159" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113833306008604159" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2025  17:01</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">WE HAVE A DEAL FOR THE HOSTAGES IN THE MIDDLE EAST. THEY WILL BE RELEASED SHORTLY. THANK YOU!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113833442957238587" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113833442957238587" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2025  17:24</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">This EPIC ceasefire agreement could have only happened as a result of our Historic Victory in November, as it signaled to the entire World that my Administration would seek Peace and negotiate deals to ensure the safety of all Americans, and our Allies. I am thrilled American and Israeli hostages will be returning home to be reunited with their families and loved ones.  With this deal in place, my National Security team, through the efforts of Special Envoy to the Middle East, Steve Witkoff, will continue to work closely with Israel and our Allies to make sure Gaza NEVER again becomes a terrorist safe haven. We will continue promoting PEACE THROUGH STRENGTH throughout the region, as we build upon the momentum of this ceasefire to further expand the Historic Abraham Accords. This is only the beginning of great things to come for America, and indeed, the World! We have achieved so much without even being in the White House. Just imagine all of the wonderful things that will happen when I return to the White House, and my Administration is fully confirmed, so they can secure more Victories for the United States!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113833531533520804" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113833531533520804" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>

  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">

</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2025  18:45</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">RT @realDonaldTrumpThank you, and congratulations, to the International Longshoremen&#x27;s Association!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113833850315456524" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113833850315456524" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2025  20:37</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text"></div>
  
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113834291728105894" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113834291728105894" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 16, 2025  01:04</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">As of today, the incoming Trump Administration has hired over 1,000 people for The United States Government. They are outstanding in every way, and you will see the fruits of their labor over the coming years. We will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN, and it will happen very quickly! In order to save time, money, and effort, it would be helpful if you would not send, or recommend to us, people who worked with, or are endorsed by, Americans for No Prosperity (headed by Charles Koch), “Dumb as a Rock” John Bolton, “Birdbrain” Nikki Haley, Mike Pence, disloyal Warmongers Dick Cheney, and his Psycho daughter, Liz, Mitt Romney, Paul Ryan, General(?) Mark Milley, James Mattis, Mark Yesper, or any of the other people suffering from Trump Derangement Syndrome, more commonly known as TDS. Thank you for your attention to this matter!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113835342903467996" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113835342903467996" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 16, 2025  16:11</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">It is my honor to announce that Wells Griffith will be the next Under Secretary of Energy at the United States Department of Energy. During my First Term, Wells served as the Senior Advisor to the CEO of the U.S. International Development Finance Corporation, Senior Director for Energy and Environment on the National Security Council, as well as Acting Assistant Secretary for International Affairs at the Department of Energy. Wells will now work with our highly respected Secretary of Energy Nominee, Chris Wright, to DRILL, BABY, DRILL, and unleash American Energy Dominance. Congratulations Wells!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113838910141234898" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113838910141234898" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 16, 2025  16:12</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">I am pleased to announce that Dr. Darío Gil will be the next Under Secretary for Science and Innovation at the United States Department of Energy. Darío is a brilliant businessman and scientist, with a distinguished record as the Chairman of the National Science Board, and Senior Vice President and Director of IBM Research. He previously served on the Presidential Council of Advisors for Science and Technology during my First Term. Darío is an elected member of the National Academy of Engineering, and received his Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering and Computer Science from MIT. Congratulations Darío!</div>
  
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113838910394876248" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113838910394876248" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 16, 2025  16:12</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">I am pleased to announce that former Congressman Brandon Williams will serve as the next Under Secretary for Nuclear Security and the Administrator of the National Nuclear Security Administration at the United States Department of Energy. Brandon is a successful businessman and Veteran of the U.S. Navy, where he served as a Nuclear Submarine Officer, and Strategic Missile Officer. He is a graduate of Pepperdine University, and the Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania. Congratulations Brandon!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113838911029899508" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113838911029899508" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 16, 2025  16:12</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">I am pleased to announce that Bill Pulte will serve as the next Director of the Federal Housing Finance Agency. Bill needs no formal introduction to the Great Citizens of our Country, because they have seen, and many have experienced, his philanthropy firsthand. He believes in the incredible potential of our Nation, and will help us restore the American Dream FOR ALL. Congratulations Bill!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113838912162964211" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113838912162964211" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 16, 2025  17:36</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">It is my honor to announce Jon Voight, Mel Gibson, and Sylvester Stallone, to be Special Ambassadors to a great but very troubled place, Hollywood, California. They will serve as Special Envoys to me for the purpose of bringing Hollywood, which has lost much business over the last four years to Foreign Countries, BACK—BIGGER, BETTER, AND STRONGER THAN EVER BEFORE! These three very talented people will be my eyes and ears, and I will get done what they suggest. It will again be, like The United States of America itself, The Golden Age of Hollywood!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113839243472952784" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 16, 2025  19:24</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">Arab officials: “Trump envoy swayed Netanyahu more in one meeting than Biden did all year” https://www.timesofisrael.com/arab-official-trump-envoy-swayed-netanyahu-more-in-one-meeting-than-biden-did-all-year/</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113839665323394410" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113839665323394410" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 16, 2025  19:58</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">I am pleased to announce that Chris Stallings will be the United States Assistant Administrator for Disaster Recovery and Resilience of the Small Business Administration. Chris Stallings currently serves as the Director of the Georgia Emergency Management and Homeland Security Agency. He will work closely with Kelly Loeffler, our next Small Business Administrator, to make sure that when disasters happen, our Government responds quickly and capably to protect our Small Businesses, which are the backbone of our Economy. Congratulations Chris!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113839799861268090" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113839799861268090" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 16, 2025  19:58</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">I am pleased to announce Luke Lindberg will serve as the next United States Under Secretary for Trade and Foreign Agriculture Affairs at the Department of Agriculture. During my First Term, Luke served as Chief of Staff and Chief Strategy Officer at the Export-Import Bank, where he earned the Distinguished Service Award. He is currently the President &amp;amp; CEO of South Dakota Trade, and a member of the Board of Directors of the National Association of District Export Councils. Luke will work to make sure American Farmers and Ranchers get the smart Trade Deals that they deserve. Congratulations Luke!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113839800612338060" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113839800612338060" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 16, 2025  19:58</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">I am pleased to announce that Olivia Trusty will serve as a Commissioner on the Federal Communications Commission (FCC). Olivia is currently the Policy Director on the United States Senate Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation, where she has fought tirelessly to grow the Economy, empower Innovation, and reignite the American Dream. She is a graduate of the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill, and Georgetown University. Olivia will work with our incredible new Chairman of the FCC, Brendan Carr, to cut regulations at a record pace, protect Free Speech, and ensure every American has access to affordable and fast Internet. Congratulations Olivia!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113839801377597625" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113839801377597625" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 16, 2025  19:58</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">I am pleased to announce that Dr. Troy Meink will be the next United States Secretary of the Air Force. Troy currently serves as the Principal Deputy Director of the National Reconnaissance Office, and began his career as a KC-135 Tanker Navigator, and later, as a test engineer for missile defense systems. Troy will work with our incredible Secretary of Defense Nominee, Pete Hegseth, to ensure that our Nation’s Air Force is the most effective and deadly force in the World, as we secure PEACE THROUGH STRENGTH. Congratulations Troy!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113839802504691145" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113839802504691145" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 16, 2025  19:58</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">I am pleased to announce that Dudley Hoskins will be the United States Under Secretary for Marketing and Regulator Programs at the Department of Agriculture. Dudley currently serves as Counsel on the Senate Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry, and previously spent four years at USDA during my First Term, as the Chief of Staff for Marketing and Regulatory Programs, and Senior Advisor to the Secretary. He will work with our great Secretary of Agriculture Nominee, Brooke Rollins, to make sure American food is the safest and healthiest in the World. Congratulations Dudley!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113839802746301933" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113839802746301933" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 16, 2025  22:28</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">I am pleased to announce that Richard Fordyce will be the next United States Under Secretary for Farm Production and Conservation at the Department of Agriculture. Richard is a proud fourth generation soy, corn, and beef cattle farmer, who served as the Administrator of the Farm Service Agency at USDA during my First Term, and was formerly Missouri’s Director of Agriculture. He will work closely with our wonderful Secretary of Agriculture Nominee, Brooke Rollins, to ensure that our incredible American Farmers and Ranchers have the support they need to feed our Great Nation, and the World. Congratulations Richard!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113840390339817438" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113840390339817438" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 16, 2025  22:28</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">I am pleased to announce that Michael Boren will serve as the United States Under Secretary for Natural Resources and Environment at the Department of Agriculture. Michael is a successful businessman, who has founded six companies, including Clearwater Analytics. He has also served as a volunteer fireman for Sawtooth Valley Rural Fire Department, and as a board member of the Idaho Department of Parks and Recreation. Michael will work to reinvigorate Forest Management at a time when it is desperately needed. Congratulations Michael!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113840390686249645" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113840390686249645" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 17, 2025  00:45</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">We demand that the FBI preserve and retain all records, documents, and information on the now closing DEI Office—Never should have been opened and, if it was, should have closed long ago. Why is it that they’re closing one day before the Inauguration of a new Administration? The reason is, CORRUPTION! https://www.mediaite.com/trump/just-in-fbi-shuttered-dei-office-ahead-of-trumps-inauguration/</div>
  
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113840929878704254" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113840929878704254" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 17, 2025  13:40</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">RT @justthenewsIsrael&#x27;s Netanyahu confirms hostage deal with Hamas has been reached despite &#x27;last minute crisis&#x27; https://justthenews.com/world/middle-east/israels-netanyahu-confirms-hostage-deal-hamas-has-been-reached?utm_source=mux&amp;amp;utm_medium=social-media&amp;amp;utm_campaign=social-media-autopost</div>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 17, 2025  14:28</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">I just spoke to Chairman Xi Jinping of China. The call was a very good one for both China and the U.S.A. It is my expectation that we will solve many problems together, and starting immediately. We discussed balancing Trade, Fentanyl, TikTok, and many other subjects. President Xi and I will do everything possible to make the World more peaceful and safe!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113844165549788304" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113844165549788304" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 17, 2025  16:14</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">The Supreme Court decision was expected, and everyone must respect it. My decision on TikTok will be made in the not too distant future, but I must have time to review the situation. Stay tuned!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113844584193010573" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113844584193010573" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 17, 2025  16:55</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">January 20th cannot come fast enough! Everybody, even those that initially opposed a Victory by President Donald J. Trump and the Trump Administration, just want it to happen. It is my obligation to protect the People of our Country but, before we even begin, we have to think of the Inauguration itself. The weather forecast for Washington, D.C., with the windchill factor, could take temperatures into severe record lows. There is an Arctic blast sweeping the Country. I don’t want to see people hurt, or injured, in any way. It is dangerous conditions for the tens of thousands of Law Enforcement, First Responders, Police K9s and even horses, and hundreds of thousands of supporters that will be outside for many hours on the 20th (In any event, if you decide to come, dress warmly!). Therefore, I have ordered the Inauguration Address, in addition to prayers and other speeches, to be delivered in the United States Capitol Rotunda, as was used by Ronald Reagan in 1985, also because of very cold weather. The various Dignitaries and Guests will be brought into the Capitol. This will be a very beautiful experience for all, and especially for the large TV audience! We will open Capital One Arena on Monday for LIVE viewing of this Historic event, and to host the Presidential Parade. I will join the crowd at Capital One, after my Swearing In. All other events will remain the same, including the Victory Rally at Capital One Arena, on Sunday at 3 P.M. (Doors open at 1 P.M.—Please arrive early!), and all three Inaugural Balls on Monday evening. Everyone will be safe, everyone will be happy, and we will, together, MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113844745273237387" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113844745273237387" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 18, 2025  01:10</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">I am pleased to announce that Lieutenant Colonel Matthew Lohmeier will be the next United States Under Secretary of the Air Force. Matt is a former fighter pilot, and Space Force Squadron Commander, who has devoted his life to serving our Great Nation. He is a proud graduate of the U.S. Air Force Academy. Matthew will work with the GREAT Secretary of Defense Nominee, Pete Hegseth, to end the devastating “woke” policies that have destroyed our Military, and make our Country STRONG AGAIN. Congratulations Matthew!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113846689919960778" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113846689919960778" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 18, 2025  13:29</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">I am pleased to announce that Penny Schwinn will be our next United States Deputy Secretary of Education. Penny has a strong record of delivering results for children and families. She previously served as the Commissioner of the Tennessee Department of Education and, at the Texas Education Agency, as the Deputy Commissioner of Standards and Engagement, Deputy Commissioner of Special Populations and Monitoring, and Chief Deputy Commissioner of Academics. She was also the Assistant Secretary of Education of Delaware, and holds a master’s degree from Johns Hopkins, as well as a Ph.D. from Claremont. A former teacher herself, Penny became the founding principal of a charter school, because she believes in the power of School Choice, and is committed to delivering the American Dream to the next Generation by returning Education BACK TO THE STATES. Congratulations to Penny and her wonderful family!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113849594966153309" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113849594966153309" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2025  13:42</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">RT @Mickeyt62</div>
  
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113855308470528772" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2025  15:00</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">I’m asking companies not to let TikTok stay dark! I will issue an executive order on Monday to extend the period of time before the law’s prohibitions take effect, so that we can make a deal to protect our national security. The order will also confirm that there will be no liability for any company that helped keep TikTok from going dark before my order. Americans deserve to see our exciting Inauguration on Monday, as well as other events and conversations. I would like the United States to have a 50% ownership position in a joint venture.  By doing this, we save TikTok, keep it in good hands and allow it to say up.  Without U.S. approval, there is no Tik Tok.  With our approval, it is worth hundreds of billions of dollars - maybe trillions.  Therefore, my initial thought is a joint venture between the current owners and/or new owners whereby the U.S. gets a 50% ownership in a joint venture set up between the U.S. and whichever purchase we so choose.</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113855616848696050" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113855616848696050" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2025  13:17</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text"></div>
  
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113860871478605894" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2025  05:28</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">Our first day in the White House is not over yet! My Presidential Personnel Office is actively in the process of identifying and removing over a thousand Presidential Appointees from the previous Administration, who are not aligned with our vision to Make America Great Again.Let this serve as Official Notice of Dismissal for these 4 individuals, with many more, coming soon:Jose Andres from the President’s Council on Sports, Fitness and Nutrition, Mark Milley from the National Infrastructure Advisory Council, Brian Hook from the Wilson Center for Scholars, and Keisha Lance Bottoms from the President’s Export Council—YOU’RE FIRED!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113864692804149616" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113864692804149616" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #C9A961" data-theme="nicknames_good" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>

    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2025  07:53</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">RT @TeamTrumpThanks to President Trump, American women are hereby protected from radical gender ideology 🔥</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div>
